// <auto-generated />
// This file is auto-generated. Do not edit manually.
// Structure: Pgm
#nullable enable
using System;
using System.Runtime.CompilerServices;
using System.Runtime.InteropServices;

internal static class FastData
{


    private static readonly int[] _keys = new int[] {
        1, 2, 3, 4, 5
    };

    private static readonly int[] _segKeys = new int[] {
        1, 6, int.MaxValue
    };

    private static readonly float[] _segSlopes = new float[] {
        13.8f, 0.0f, 0.0f
    };

    private static readonly int[] _segIntercepts = new int[] {
        0, 5, 5
    };

    [MethodImpl(MethodImplOptions.AggressiveInlining)]
    private static int EvaluateSegment(int seg, int key)
    {
        unchecked
        {
            double diff = (uint)key - (uint)_segKeys[seg];
            int pos = (int)(long)(_segSlopes[seg] * diff);
            return pos < 0 ? 0 : pos + _segIntercepts[seg];
        }
    }

    private static int GetSegmentPos(int key)
    {
        int seg = 0;
        int segHi = 1;
        while (seg < segHi)
        {
            int mid = seg + ((segHi - seg) >> 1);
            if (_segKeys[mid + 1] <= key)
                seg = mid + 1;
            else
                segHi = mid;
        }

        int pos = EvaluateSegment(seg, key);
        int nextIntercept = _segIntercepts[seg + 1];
        if (pos > nextIntercept) pos = nextIntercept;
        return pos;
    }

    
    public static bool Contains(int key)
    {


        int pos = GetSegmentPos(key);

        int lo = pos - 64;
        if (lo < 0) lo = 0;
        int hi = pos + 66;
        if (hi > 5) hi = 5;

        while (lo < hi)
        {
            int i = lo + ((hi - lo) >> 1);
            if (_keys[i] == key)
                return true;
            if (_keys[i] < key)
                lo = i + 1;
            else
                hi = i;
        }

        return false;
    }

    public const int ItemCount = 5;
    public const int MinKey = 1;
    public const int MaxKey = 5;
}
